steps.title: Translate the unit rate to an expression
steps.content: Each kilogram of soil contains 600 milligrams of phosphorus. This means the total phosphorus equals (mass in kilograms) times 600. Since the mass is $x$ kilograms, the total phosphorus is $600x$ milligrams.

steps.title: Set equal to the given total
steps.content:
The problem states the total phosphorus is 1,200 milligrams. Setting our expression equal to this:
$$600x = 1,200$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
